title: CBD Care's newest store at Heather Park Shopping Centre
description: BUSINESS NEWS - The George community is...
bodyText:
Advertorial

BUSINESS NEWS - The George community is invited to celebrate the grand opening of CBD Care's newest store at Heather Park Shopping Centre. This event promises a warm welcome, exclusive opening specials, and an opportunity to learn about the transformative power of plant medicine, particularly cannabis. The opening takes place on 1 June from 10:00 to 14:00.

In South Africa, CBD products have gained significant traction following the legalisation of cannabis for medicinal use.

The South African Health Products Regulatory Authority (Sahpra) allows the sale of CBD products that contain a maximum daily dose of 20mg and meet strict manufacturing and quality standards. CBD Care ensures all its products comply with these regulations, providing safe and effective options for our customers.

CBD, or cannabidiol, is renowned for its numerous health benefits, including pain relief, anxiety reduction and improved sleep. Unlike THC, another compound found in cannabis, CBD does not produce an intoxicating effect, making it a popular choice for those seeking natural health solutions without the high.


> Beyond CBD products, CBD Care offers a comprehensive range of health and wellness items similar to a traditional health shop. Our shelves are stocked with high-quality supplements, superfoods, essential oils and a variety of natural and organic products to support a holistic lifestyle.


Additionally, CBD Care assists individuals in accessing medicinal cannabis through the Section 21 application, facilitating access to life-changing treatments under medical supervision.

Join us at our new Heather Park location to explore our extensive range, meet our knowledgeable staff, and discover how CBD and other natural products can enhance your well-being. The grand opening will feature product demonstrations, live piano music and a welcoming community atmosphere. Don't miss out on this exciting event!

We look forward to seeing you there and helping you embark on your journey to better health with CBD Care!

For more information, visit our website:

www.cbdcare.co.za or contact us on 082 330 2611 or infocbdcare.co.za.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
